bad_result_policy.suggested_children: No direct refinement/continuation. At most one genuinely divergent child using a different driver: macro-yield/curve-carry data if qfa supports non-OHLCV macro inputs, not another OHLCV defensive ETF weight tweak.

costs_slippage.assumption: 5 bps one-way slippage/transaction cost multiplied by daily target-weight turnover; qfa reported metrics are pre-cost; cost-adjusted metrics are ex-post recomputed from model weights on Alpaca bars.

data_source: Alpaca real market data via qfa AlpacaGateway; no CSV; --data-csv not used
decision_rationale: Watchlist/not accepted: random-window 5 bps costed Sharpe is positive and drawdown controlled, and correlation to AR-015 is reduced, but performance is modest/regime fragile and qfa costs are ex-post rather than native.

orthogonality.method: Pearson correlation of daily qfa equity-curve returns versus retained latest.json artifacts with sufficient overlap.
